title: BN8 6JN, M.D.J. Light Brothers (Scrap Processers) Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/KP3894HG/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: M.D.J. Light Brothers (Scrap Processers) Limited Installation name: Greystone Quarry Waste Facility Permit number: EPR/KP3894HG/V003  "
